title: sigmapack
description: the worst texturepack known to man
body:
hi, this is sigmapack. created by the world-famous sigma_turbine (disclaimer: not actually world-famous), for like-mindedly world-famous minecraft players (disclaimer: also probably not actually world-famous).

it's awful. don't have high expectations. 

you might need to extract the pack to get it to work. language should be set to English (US) for lang related tweaks. 

pack mostly modifies audio, entities, items, and gui. 

if looking for a specific version, the github may have other releases: https://github.com/ComradeBlaze/sigmapack

questions, comments, insults, whatever? discord is @comradeblaze

thnaks for checking it out
